import Header from "./Header.js"; import List from "./Data.js"; import { useState , useRef} from "react"; function App() { const[taskList , setTaskList]=useState(List) let titleinpute = useRef(); let priorityinpute = useRef(); const setOprations = (taskId) => { setTaskList(taskList.map(task => task.Sno === taskId ? { ...task, opration: task.opration === "active" ? "deactive" : "active" }: task )); }; const addTask = () => { let sno = List.length+1; let title = titleinpute.current.value; let priority = priorityinpute.current.value; let currentDate = new Date(Date.now()).toLocaleDateString(); let opration = "active" setTaskList([...taskList,{sno,title,priority,currentDate}]) } return <>
